sentences.target: C'est une vraie révélation pour moi.

translations.fr: C'est une vraie révélation pour moi.
translations.en: It's a real revelation for me.
translations.es: Es una verdadera revelación para mí.
translations.de: Das ist eine echte Offenbarung für mich.
translations.it: È una vera rivelazione per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我来说真是一次惊喜。
translations.yue: 對我嚟講真係一個大發現。
translations.pt: É uma verdadeira revelação para mim.
translations.vi: Đây thực sự là một khám phá đối với tôi.
translations.ar: إنه حقًا اكتشاف حقيقي بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: Het is een echte openbaring voor mij.
translations.hi: यह मेरे लिए सच में एक खोज है.
translations.el: Είναι μια πραγματική αποκάλυψη για μένα.
translations.nb: Det er en ekte åpenbaring for meg.
translations.id: Ini benar-benar sebuah penemuan bagi saya.
translations.sv: Det är en riktig aha-upplevelse för mig.
translations.ro: Este o adevărată revelație pentru mine.
translations.cs: Je to pro mě skutečný objev.
translations.da: Det er en virkelig opdagelse for mig.
translations.ja: 私にとって本当に大きな発見です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun used before the copula in the fixed expression ‘c’est’, functioning as the grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject ‘C’’ to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘révélation’.
Attributive adjective, feminine singular, modifying ‘révélation’.
Common noun, singular; predicate nominal complement of the copula.
Preposition introducing the prepositional complement ‘pour moi’ (beneficiary).
Tonic pronoun, 1st person singular; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Cette révélation nous a surpris au dîner.

translations.fr: Cette révélation nous a surpris au dîner.
translations.en: That revelation surprised us at dinner.
translations.es: Esa revelación nos sorprendió durante la cena.
translations.de: Diese Enthüllung hat uns beim Abendessen überrascht.
translations.it: Quella rivelazione ci ha sorpreso a cena.
translations.ko: 그 사실에 우리는 저녁 먹는 동안 깜짝 놀랐어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个消息在晚餐时让我们大吃一惊。
translations.yue: 嗰個消息喺晚餐時令我哋大吃一驚。
translations.ru: Это откровение удивило нас за ужином.
translations.pt: Essa revelação nos surpreendeu durante o jantar.
translations.he: הגילוי הזה הפתיע אותנו בארוחת הערב.
translations.tr: Bu açıklama bizi akşam yemeğinde şaşırttı.
translations.vi: Sự tiết lộ đó khiến chúng tôi bất ngờ trong bữa tối.
translations.nl: Die onthulling verraste ons tijdens het diner.
translations.uk: Це відкриття здивувало нас за вечерею.
translations.hu: Az a leleplezés meglepett minket vacsora közben.
translations.hi: उस खुलासे ने हमें रात के खाने में चौंका दिया.
translations.pl: Ta rewelacja zaskoczyła nas podczas kolacji.
translations.el: Αυτή η αποκάλυψη μας εξέπληξε κατά το δείπνο.
translations.id: Pengungkapan itu membuat kami terkejut saat makan malam.
translations.ro: Acea revelație ne-a surprins la cină.
translations.cs: To odhalení nás překvapilo při večeři.
translations.ja: その告白は夕食のときに私たちを驚かせました。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘révélation’.
Common noun, singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person plural; direct object of ‘a surpris’.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; forms the passé composé with the participle ‘surpris’.
Past participle serving as the main verb in the compound tense; agrees by default in masculine singular here.
Fused form of ‘à’ + ‘le’; preposition introducing the complement ‘au dîner’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Je fais une révélation à ma sœur.

translations.fr: Je fais une révélation à ma sœur.
translations.en: I'm making a big reveal to my sister.
translations.es: Le hago una revelación a mi hermana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在向我妹妹透露一个秘密。
translations.yue: 我正同我阿姐講一個秘密。
translations.pt: Estou revelando um segredo para minha irmã.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tiết lộ một bí mật cho chị gái tôi.
translations.nl: Ik vertel ein geheim aan mijn zus.
translations.hu: Egy titkot árulok el a lánytestvéremnek.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी बहन को एक राज बता रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αποκαλύπτω ένα μυστικό στην αδελφή μου.
translations.nb: Jeg avslører en hemmelighet for søsteren min.
translations.id: Saya mengungkapkan sebuah rahasia kepada saudari saya.
translations.sv: Jag avslöjar en hemlighet för min syster.
translations.da: Jeg afslører en hemmelighed for min søster.
translations.ja: 私は姉に秘密を打ち明けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘révélation’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘fais’.
Preposition introducing the indirect object phrase.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies ‘sœur’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’.

translations.en: What a revelation during the meeting.
translations.de: Was für eine Offenbarung während der Besprechung.
translations.zh-Hans: 会议期间真是个重大发现。
translations.yue: 開會期間真係好大嘅發現。
translations.tr: Toplantı sırasında ne büyük bir keşif.
translations.vi: Thật là một khám phá trong cuộc họp.
translations.ar: يا له من اكتشاف خلال الاجتماع.
translations.nl: Wat een onthulling tijdens de vergadering.
translations.hi: बैठक के दौरान क्या ही खुलासा.
translations.el: Τι αποκάλυψη κατά τη διάρκεια της συνάντησης.
translations.ja: 会議中に何という発見だ。

tokens.explanation: Exclamative/interrogative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘révélation’.
Common noun; head of the exclamative noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘réunion’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘pendant’.
